initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_sum,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales_sum,
    SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) / NULLIF(SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price), 0) AS web_to_store_ratio
FROM 
    web_sales ws
    JOIN date_dim ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN customer ON ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    LEFT JOIN store_sales ss 
        ON ss.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk 
        AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq = 1176
GROUP BY 
    customer.c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    web_to_store_ratio DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    customer.c_customer_id,
    SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_sum,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales_sum,
    SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) / NULLIF(SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price), 0) AS web_to_store_ratio
FROM 
    web_sales
    JOIN customer ON web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
    JOIN store_sales ON store_sales.ss_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim AS store_date ON store_sales.ss_sold_date_sk = store_date.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq = 1176
    AND store_date.d_month_seq = 1176
GROUP BY 
    customer.c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    web_to_store_ratio DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    customer.c_customer_id,
    SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_sum,
    SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales_sum,
    SUM(web_sales.ws_ext_sales_price) / NULLIF(SUM(store_sales.ss_ext_sales_price), 0) AS web_to_store_ratio
FROM 
    web_sales
JOIN 
    date_dim ON web_sales.ws_sold_date_sk = date_dim.d_date_sk
JOIN 
    customer ON web_sales.ws_bill_customer_sk = customer.c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    store_sales ON customer.c_customer_sk = store_sales.ss_customer_sk
WHERE 
    date_dim.d_month_seq = 1176
GROUP BY 
    customer.c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    web_to_store_ratio DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_sum,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales_sum,
    SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) / NULLIF(SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price), 0) AS web_to_store_ratio
FROM 
    web_sales ws
    JOIN customer c ON ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    JOIN date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    store_sales ss 
    ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk 
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_month_seq = 1176
GROUP BY 
    c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    web_to_store_ratio DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT 
    c_customer_id,
    SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) AS web_sales_sum,
    SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price) AS store_sales_sum,
    SUM(ws.ws_ext_sales_price) / NULLIF(SUM(ss.ss_ext_sales_price), 0) AS web_to_store_ratio
FROM 
    web_sales ws
JOIN 
    customer c ON ws.ws_bill_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
JOIN 
    date_dim d ON ws.ws_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
LEFT JOIN 
    store_sales ss ON ss.ss_customer_sk = c.c_customer_sk
    AND ss.ss_sold_date_sk = d.d_date_sk
WHERE 
    d.d_month_seq = 1176
GROUP BY 
    c_customer_id
ORDER BY 
    web_to_store_ratio DESC
LIMIT 100;
